segments.text: Thank you for calling. We're speaking with Sara on a recorded line for English. Press one.
Par español, presione dos. Thank you for calling. You are speaking with Sara on a
recorded line for English. Press one. Par español, presione dos. You are speaking
with Sara on a recorded line. Can you please tell me who you are calling as?
I'm calling for Dr. Masi and we're here to set up here to be a call with him.
Thank you for letting me know. Just to clarify, is this a doctor-to-doctor call
about a patient? Are you still there? Yeah, I'm here. Thank you for confirming. Since
you are calling to set up a call with Dr. Maddie, and if this is a doctor-to-doctor
conversation about a patient, I will connect you with our peer-to-peer team now. Are
you still there? Yes, I'm here. You are calling to set up a doctor-to-doctor
call with Dr. Maddie. I will connect you with our peer-to-peer team now.
